name: Kobe Bryant
title: Last known photo of Kobe Bryant, taken the night before his death at a basketball game with his daughter Gianna on January 25, 2020.
description: Kobe Bryant was photographed the night before his death at a basketball game alongside his daughter Gianna. The following morning, on January 26, 2020, both Kobe and Gianna were among nine people killed in a helicopter crash in Calabasas, California.
bio: Kobe Bean Bryant was an American professional basketball player who spent his entire 20-year career with the Los Angeles Lakers. Widely regarded as one of the greatest players in NBA history, he won five NBA championships, was an 18-time All-Star, and the 2008 NBA MVP.
